name: Buchhaltungs Tool / Finanz Tracker
description: Planung, Umsetzung und Qualitätssicherung eines auditierbaren Finanztracking-Systems.
nextAction: Continue P1-4 Daily UX Stabilization after the current implementation report.
warning: Masterchat and active implementation chats need a current linked backup before the next major batch.

goals.goal: Build an everyday, deterministic and audit-friendly finance tracker.
goals.problem: Project knowledge, tests, decisions and handoffs are distributed across chats, files and repositories.
goals.targetGroup: Mika and Kira as first users; architecture remains configurable for further users.
successCriteria: Daily use remains understandable and fast.
Financial logic is deterministic and testable.
nonGoals: No automatic financial decisions by AI.
constraints: Private notes and screenshots stay local or in explicit backups.

phases.title: Finanztracker Beta-Stabilisierung
phases.description: Historical P0/P1 batches and manual tests from the former Todo tool.

phases.title: Nächste Implementierungsbatches
phases.description: Daily UX fixes followed by transaction history and deeper finance features.

bugs.title: Haushaltsbereich nach früherem Stand nicht vollständig funktionsfähig
bugs.description: Several historical household tests are unresolved; detailed private notes remain local.

bugs.title: Finaler Finanztracker-Teststand muss eindeutig dokumentiert werden
bugs.description: The expected branch/commit of the historical test is not fully confirmed.

ideas.title: Configurable project and finance dashboard cards
ideas.description: Allow users to pin relevant cards after the core daily workflow is stable.

questions.title: Which Finanztracker project information belongs in a private repository?
questions.impact: Determines where real project summaries and backups can be stored.

decisions.title: Financial logic stays deterministic
decisions.reason: Calculations must be testable and auditable.
decisions.decision: AI may explain and suggest, but does not generate or change financial calculation logic.
decisions.impact: Finance calculations remain programmed and covered by tests.

decisions.title: Public-safe metadata and private evidence remain separated
decisions.reason: The repository may be public while notes and screenshots can be sensitive.
decisions.decision: Only sanitized metadata is committed; private evidence stays local/export-only until private-repo handling is confirmed.
decisions.impact: Backups remain required for device changes.

aiModels.name: ChatGPT
aiModels.role: Project steering, masterchat, review and handoffs

repositories.name: MikaMcFlurry/Buchhaltung-tool
repositories.warning: Use reviewed branches and do not merge blindly.

timeline.title: 48-hour test run and local documentation
timeline.description: Historical batches, test results and screenshots were maintained in the Todo tool.

timeline.title: Legacy backup exported
timeline.description: The backup remains the migration reference and is not committed.

risks.title: Private evidence in a public repository
risks.impact: Notes, chat summaries or screenshots could become public.
risks.mitigation: Keep private content local/export-only and prepare private-repo usage.

risks.title: Loss of legacy evidence during migration
risks.impact: Test status, notes or screenshots could be lost.
risks.mitigation: Non-destructive import, conflict copies and explicit migration tests.
